component.name: Cloudflare One GUI
component.summary: Linux GUI for Cloudflare WARP via warp-cli

description.p: A local desktop-style GUI that wraps the host Cloudflare WARP client (warp-cli). The Flatpak runs Node inside the sandbox and calls warp-cli on the host through flatpak-spawn --host. Cloudflare WARP must already be installed on the system.

component.developer_name: Cloudflare One GUI for Linux contributors
